prose:
**Furan frontier orbitals** — computed with chemkit `frontier-orbitals` using DFT **b3lyp/def2-tzvp** (tier `standard`) in **PySCF**, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: user-supplied XYZ file `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/furan/furan.xyz` used as the input geometry for the orbital calculation; no geometry optimization was reported by this task. SCF converged: true, in 9 cycles. Software version was not returned by the tool.

Headline result: **HOMO–LUMO gap = 6.2573602 eV**.

Additional returned orbital energies: HOMO = -6.3597638 eV; LUMO = -0.1024036 eV. The returned total electronic energy was -230.11429 hartree (-6261.7289 eV).

Warnings: no warnings were returned by chemkit.

Integrity verdict: `integrity.trustworthy = true`.

Reproducibility: chemkit reported CLI invocation: `/home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py frontier --method dft --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --tier standard /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/furan/furan.xyz --out /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmp2yn48qqh/live.json`. A live `.out` log path was not included in the tool result I received.
